ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hands" (
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hand */,
  "hand_name" TEXT /* Name of the hand (e.g., Royal Flush, Straight Flush) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hand */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Poker variant (e.g., Texas Hold'em, Omaha) */,
  "cards_required" INTEGER /* Number of cards required to form the hand */,
  "example_cards" TEXT /* Example cards that form the hand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hand_rankings" (
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hand */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the hand (e.g., 1 for Royal Flush, 2 for Straight Flush) */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout for the hand */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Poker variant */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players for the hand to be valid */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players for the hand to be valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combinations" (
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combination */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Hand to which the combination belongs */,
  "combination_name" TEXT /* Name of the combination (e.g., Two Pair, Three of a Kind) */,
  "number_of_ways" INTEGER /* Number of ways the combination can occur */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Poker variant */,
  "cards_required" INTEGER /* Number of cards required to form the combination */,
  "example_cards" TEXT /* Example cards that form the combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combinations_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES hands ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "probabilities" (
  "probability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Hand to which the probability belongs */,
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* Combination to which the probability belongs */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the hand occurring */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Poker variant */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of hands used to calculate the probability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probabilities_combination_id FOREIGN KEY ("combination_id") REFERENCES combinations ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probabilities_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES hands ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Hand to which the payout belongs */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout for the hand */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Poker variant */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players for the payout to be valid */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players for the payout to be valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES hands ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_hand_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who played the hand */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Hand played by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hand was played */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Poker variant */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the hand (e.g., win, lose, tie) */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount bet by the user */,
  "net_gain" REAL /* Net gain or loss from the hand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_hand_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_hand_history_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES hands ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_model" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training data used to train the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Model that made the prediction */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Hand for which the prediction was made */,
  "prediction" REAL /* Prediction made by the model (e.g., win, lose) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Poker variant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who requested the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES hands ("hand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_model ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Hand to which the visualization belongs */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Poker variant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who generated the visualization */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES hands ("hand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
